description: Installs Python from the official python.org installer and configures pip user site.

messages.scriptDisabled: Python installation is disabled in config.
messages.pythonNotFound: Python not found, installing from the official python.org installer...
messages.uninstallingPython: Removing Python install and environment settings...
messages.pythonUninstallFailed: Python uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.pythonUninstallComplete: Python uninstall complete. Package removed, env vars cleaned, tracking purged.

commands.configure: Configure pip user site and PATH only
commands.uninstall: Uninstall Python, remove env vars, clean dev dir, purge tracking

parameters.-Path: Custom dev directory path (overrides smart detection)
